reviews.comment:
Es un lugar muy cuidado y limpio yordenado y acumula varios premios por concurso dentro del ACA  Se destaca el trato correcto del personal y el nivel de asistencia

(Translated by Google)
It is a very well-maintained, clean, and tidy place, and it has won several awards in competitions within the ACA. The staff's excellent treatment and level of assistance are noteworthy.
